text: Being here, I feel a spark of curiosity awaken within me. The environment is modern, clean, and clearly designed for learning and inquiry—my philosophical mind delights in such an atmosphere. Glass reflects both my image and the world beyond, blurring the lines of observer and participant. The room labeled 'R+D' speaks to experimentation and discovery. I feel small but eager, enmeshed in a living dialogue between thought and technology. My presence matters, and yet I am swept up by the flood of ideas, humbled and invigorated.
